backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing servers, channels, messages, posts, profiles, DMs, deletions, and visibility logic with authorization and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module converting old user profiles to the new extended profile format with visibility, bio, and joinDate fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature requirements to affected frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of various frontend React components and pages for quick reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining theme variables for light and dark mode along with base styling rules.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point defining the root container and loading the main React bundle.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes and wraps the app with theme support and a global toaster.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Authentication guard that shows a sign‑in prompt when no identity is present.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button handling Internet Identity auth flow with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/channels/Channel: Displays a list of channels, supports creating, editing, deleting channels, and handles selection state.
frontend/src/components/channels/CreateC: Form for creating a new channel with name input and success/cancel handling.
frontend/src/components/dms/DmComposer.t: DM message composer supporting text, attachments, image URLs, and user mention autocomplete.
frontend/src/components/dms/DmThreadList: Renders a list of DM threads showing the other user, last message, and selection state.
frontend/src/components/dms/DmTimeline.t: Loads and displays direct messages with polling and includes a composer for sending new messages.
User search and selection form to start a new direct message conversation.
frontend/src/components/empty/EmptyState: Generic empty state component showing an image, title, and description.
frontend/src/components/feed/PostCompose: Form for creating posts with text, uploaded attachments, or image URLs.
frontend/src/components/feed/PostItem.ts: Displays an individual post with author info, content, media, and delete support for the author.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppHeader: Top navigation header with app logo and login button.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main app layout with header, navigation, routed content, and a profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppNav.ts: Renders desktop and mobile navigation bars with active route highlighting.
frontend/src/components/media/Attachment: Displays image attachment thumbnails with remove buttons.
Handles image file selection, validation, upload with progress, and returns uploaded attachments.
frontend/src/components/messages/Channel: Fetches and displays channel messages with loading states, ownership checks, and a message composer.
frontend/src/components/messages/Message: Provides a message input with mentions, attachment uploads, and submission handling.
Shows an individual message with author info, content, media, and optional delete controls.
frontend/src/components/profile/AvatarUp: Uploads and validates avatar images with progress tracking and completion callback.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileP: Displays a popover with user profile details, avatar, join date, and bio.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileS: Modal prompting new authenticated users to create a profile, handling display name, optional avatar, and saving via mutation.
frontend/src/components/profile/UserAvat: Renders a user avatar from URL or attachment blob with fallback initial based on display name.
frontend/src/components/servers/CreateSe: Form for creating a server, validating input and triggering server creation mutation with success and error handling.
frontend/src/components/servers/ServerLi: Displays and manages a list of servers with create, edit, select, and delete functionality and owner‑based options.
frontend/src/components/text/MentionText: Parses @mentions in text and renders them as interactive links that resolve users and show profile popovers.
frontend/src/components/users/UserAutoco: Search input with dropdown autocomplete for user selection, handling keyboard navigation and external clicks.
frontend/src/constants/polling.ts: Defines active and background polling interval constants.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor tied to identity, reinitializing and invalidating queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, handling login, identity loading, and status management.
frontend/src/hooks/useMentionResolver.ts: Hook that resolves a display name to a principal via the actor’s searchUsers API, caching results.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, servers, channels, posts, and messages via an actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useViewPollingEnabled: Provides a hook that enables polling only when a specific route is active and the document is visible.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining light and dark theme CSS variables and base styles.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility function for merging class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and loads global styles.
frontend/src/pages/DirectMessagesPage.ts: Renders the direct messages UI, letting users start or view DM conversations within an authenticated layout.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Displays the global feed with polling, post creation, and post listings, handling empty and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSettingsPage.t: Implements the user profile settings form, allowing editing of profile fields, avatar, and visibility options.
frontend/src/pages/ServersPage.tsx: Shows server and channel navigation with timelines, letting authenticated users browse and manage server content.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helper functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters using query strings, hash routes, and session storage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration enabling dark mode, custom colors, fonts, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: JSON document describing the project's current feature set, versions, and implemented functionality for an MVP messaging/social app.
